mapper.select: SELECT * FROM questions WHERE delete_yn = 'N' ORDER BY question_id DESC limit #{start} , #{end}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions WHERE delete_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND delete_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND delete_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions WHERE status = 'ANSWERED' AND delete_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE() AND delete_yn = 'N'
SELECT * FROM questions WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND delete_yn = 'N'

SELECT question_id, parent_id, member_id, category, title, content, status, is_public, delete_yn, created_at, updated_at FROM questions
delete_yn = 'N'
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{content}, '%')
AND DATE(created_at) = DATE(#{createdAt})
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO questions (parent_id, member_id, category, title, content, is_public, delete_yn) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{memberId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isPublic}, #{deleteYn})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM questions WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND category = 'MEETUP' AND delete_yn = 'N' AND is_public = 'Y' ORDER BY question_id DESC
